rationale: Review 2's request to rename the three Prop classes to IsAffineAlgGroup/IsReductiveGroup/IsSemisimpleGroup (and drop the misleading unipotent_radical_trivial lemma + AlgPoints signature) is directly confirmed by the diff's own IsUnipotent/IsAlgClosed imports vs. bare class names + : True field + AlgPoints def, and would produce a materially more consistent PR under the naming rubric; Review 1's approve leaves those naming defects in place.
